assessments.pageSubtitle: View all tests, quizzes, exams and assessments.
assessments.guideline1: Start the assessment before its scheduled window closes — once time runs out, it auto-submits with whatever has been answered.
assessments.guideline2: Stay on this tab for the full duration — leaving or refreshing may end your attempt early.
assessments.guideline3: Flag questions you want to revisit and review them before submitting.
assessments.guideline4: Each assessment can only be attempted once — there is no retake unless your teacher reopens it.
assessments.guideline5: Results appear here once your teacher releases them — an "Upcoming" or "Overdue" status does not mean your score is hidden on purpose.
assessments.ruleTimerStarts: Timer starts immediately when you begin the test.
assessments.ruleNoRetakes: No retakes allowed — you only get one attempt.
assessments.ruleAutoSubmit: Test auto-submits when the timer reaches zero.
assessments.ruleStableInternet: Ensure a stable internet connection throughout.
assessments.ruleNoCopyPaste: Copy/paste and tab switching are restricted.
assessments.ruleMonitored: All interactions are monitored and logged.
assessments.confirmReadInstructions: I have read all instructions, I understand the rules, and I am ready to begin. I confirm I will not use any unauthorized resources.
assessments.noQuestionsAvailable: No questions available for this assessment.
assessments.contactTeacherOrAdmin: Please contact your teacher or admin.
assessments.placeholderFillBlank: Type the missing word or phrase…
assessments.placeholderDiagramAnswer: Describe your diagram or answer here…
assessments.typeMatchingAnswers: Type matching answers for each item
assessments.placeholderMatchFormat: Format: A-1, B-3, C-2, D-4 (or describe your matches)
assessments.clickQuestionToChange: Click any question to go back and change your answer
assessments.canStillAnswer: You can still go back and answer them before submitting.
assessments.onceSubmittedWarning: Once submitted, answers cannot be changed.
assessments.responsesRecorded: Your responses have been recorded successfully.
assessments.scoreCalculated: Your score has been calculated. View your results now!
assessments.resultsWillBePublished: Results will be published by your teacher. You'll be notified when they are available.
assessments.needMoreMarksToPass: You need {{marks}} more marks to pass.
assessments.feedbackFromTeacher: Feedback from {{teacher}} will appear here once the assessment is reviewed.
assessments.revisionPlanExcellent: you're performing excellently! Focus on maintaining your consistency and attempting advanced practice questions.
assessments.revisionPlanSolid: you have a solid foundation. Revisit the topics where you lost marks and practice with similar questions.
assessments.revisionPlanIntensive: we recommend intensive revision of the core concepts in this chapter. Start with your study materials, then attempt practice questions progressively.
assessments.personalizedPlan: Personalized improvement plan based on your performance
assessments.completeMoreToIdentify: Complete more assessments to identify strengths.
assessments.scoredAbove60: You scored above 60% — keep it up!
assessments.trySimilarQuestionTypes: Try similar question types for more practice
assessments.collaborateOnWeakTopics: Collaborate with classmates on weak topics
assessments.basedOnScorePrefix: Based on your score of {{pct}}% in {{title}},
assessments.tabSwitchDetected: Tab switch detected. This has been logged.
assessments.copyPasteDisabled: Copy/paste is disabled during the assessment.
assessments.noQuestionsContactTeacher: This assessment has no questions. Please contact your teacher.
assessments.timesUpAutoSubmitted: Time's up! Your assessment has been auto-submitted.
